


<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Amanda Diah Maharani | Portfolio</title>

  <style>
    body {
      font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
      margin: 0;
      background: #f8f9fa;
      color: #333;
    }

    header {
      background: #1f3a5f;
      color: white;
      padding: 80px 20px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    header h1 {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 36px;
    }

    header p {
      margin-top: 15px;
      font-size: 18px;
      max-width: 600px;
      margin-left: auto;
      margin-right: auto;
    }

    .btn {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      margin: 10px;
      background: #2a9d8f;
      color: white;
      text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 5px;
    }

    .btn-outline {
      background: white;
      color: #2a9d8f;
      border: 1px solid #2a9d8f;
    }

    section {
      max-width: 900px;
      margin: auto;
      padding: 50px 20px;
    }

    h2 {
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      color: #1f3a5f;
    }

    .projects {
      display: grid;
      gap: 20px;
    }

    .card {
      background: white;
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    }

    .card h3 {
      margin-top: 0;
    }

    .card ul {
      padding-left: 20px;
    }

    .skills {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    footer {
      background: #1f3a5f;
      color: white;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 30px;
    }

    a {
      color: #2a9d8f;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<header>
  <h1>Amanda Diah Maharani</h1>
  <p>
    Medical Doctor who is interested in having fun with data<br>
    I transform health data into actionable insights to support 
    evidence-based decisions and improve population health outcomes.
  </p>

  <a href="#projects" class="btn">View Projects</a>
  <a href="#" class="btn btn-outline">Download CV</a>
</header>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section>
  <h2>About Me</h2>
  <p>
    I am a public health postgraduate student with a strong interest in epidemiology,
    biostatistics, and health data analysis.
  </p>
  <p>
    My work focuses on transforming health datasets into meaningful insights 
    that can inform policy, intervention strategies, and public health decision-making.
  </p>
  <p>
    I have experience working with R, Excel, and SPSS to analyze population-level 
    health data.
  </p>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <h2>Selected Projects</h2>

  <div class="projects">

    <div class="card">
      <h3>COVID-19 Vaccination Trend Analysis</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Analyzed vaccination trends across regions</li>
        <li>Identified disparities in coverage</li>
        <li>Highlighted priority areas for intervention</li>
      </ul>
      <p><b>Tools:</b> R, ggplot2, Excel</p>
      <a href="#">View Project</a>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <h3>Risk Factor Analysis for Non-Communicable Diseases</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Explored associations between lifestyle and disease risk</li>
        <li>Identified key predictors</li>
        <li>Provided prevention insights</li>
      </ul>
      <p><b>Tools:</b> R, SPSS</p>
      <a href="#">View Project</a>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <h3>Health Inequality Analysis</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Compared outcomes across demographic groups</li>
        <li>Identified socioeconomic disparities</li>
        <li>Suggested data-driven recommendations</li>
      </ul>
      <p><b>Tools:</b> R, Excel</p>
      <a href="#">View Project</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section>
  <h2>Skills</h2>
  <div class="skills">
    <p><b>Data Analysis:</b> R, Excel, SPSS</p>
    <p><b>Data Visualization:</b> ggplot2</p>
    <p><b>Public Health:</b> Epidemiology, Biostatistics, Health Policy</p>
    <p><b>Research:</b> Statistical Analysis, Data Interpretation</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<footer>
  <h2>Get in Touch</h2>
  <p>Email: amanda.dmaharani@gmail.com</p>
  <p>
    <a href="#">https://www.linkedin.com/in/amandadiahm</a> |
    <a href="#">https://github.com/amandadiahm</a>
  </p>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
